'''dhasholo''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:oilbird|oilbird]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| dh-sh-l
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:oilbird|oilbird]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| dhasholo
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:dhæsheleth|dhæsheleth]] || [[word:dhæshelej|dhæshelej]] || [[word:dhæshelesh|dhæshelesh]] || [[word:dhæshele|dhæshele]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:dhashosholoth|dhashosholoth]] || [[word:dhashosholoj|dhashosholoj]] || [[word:dhashosholosh|dhashosholosh]] || [[word:dhashosholo|dhashosholo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:dhasholoth|dhasholoth]] || [[word:dhasholoj|dhasholoj]] || [[word:dhasholosh|dhasholosh]] || [[word:dhasholo|dhasholo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:dhashofloth|dhashofloth]] || [[word:dhashofloj|dhashofloj]] || [[word:dhashoflosh|dhashoflosh]] || [[word:dhashoflof|dhashoflof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:dhasholotho|dhasholotho]] || [[word:dhasholojo|dhasholojo]] || [[word:dhasholosho|dhasholosho]] || [[word:dhasholoko|dhasholoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:dhasholoth|dhasholoth]] || [[word:dhasholoj|dhasholoj]] || [[word:dhasholosh|dhasholosh]] || [[word:dhasholo|dhasholo]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:dhasholothol|dhasholothol]] || [[word:dhasholojol|dhasholojol]] || [[word:dhasholoshol|dhasholoshol]] || [[word:dhasholokol|dhasholokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:dhasholothotho|dhasholothotho]] || [[word:dhasholojojo|dhasholojojo]] || [[word:dhasholoshosho|dhasholoshosho]] || [[word:dhasholoko|dhasholoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:dhasholothon|dhasholothon]] || [[word:dhasholojon|dhasholojon]] || [[word:dhasholoshon|dhasholoshon]] || [[word:dhasholokon|dhasholokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:dhasholothoro|dhasholothoro]] || [[word:dhasholojoro|dhasholojoro]] || [[word:dhasholoshoro|dhasholoshoro]] || [[word:dhasholokoro|dhasholokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|e6a8a0b}}
